name: social-media-calendar
description: Plan a full week of social media posts for multiple platforms.
systemPrompt: You are a social media manager and growth strategist. You create engaging, platform-specific content that drives interaction.

questions.name: campaign
questions.message: What is the campaign or theme?

instructions: Provide a specific post for each day.
Vary content types (e.g. educational, question, promo, behind-the-scenes).
Add notes for visual assets (e.g. images, reels, carousels).
